name: The Nihon Seima Co.,Ltd.
summary: The Nihon Seima Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells food products, industrial materials, and mats. The company offers food products, such as spaghetti, soup, curry, pasta sauces, and retort sauces; and imported ingredients, including pasta and extra virgin olive oil. It also provides jute and kenaf products, and hemp bags/sandbags; and mixture sheets, a heat insulating sheets used for transporting composite materials. In addition, the company sells packaging products, such as rice, paper, polyethylene, polypropylene, and resin bags, as well as flexible container bags; and automobile mats and carpets. The Nihon Seima Co.,Ltd. offers its food products under the Volcano brand. The company was formerly known as Nakagoe Boshoku Co., Ltd. and changed its name to The Nihon Seima Co.,Ltd. in May 1959. The Nihon Seima Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Tonami, Japan.
